'''X10-D''', also known as '''Exten-dee''' and '''X-10-D''',<ref name="CSWE" /> was a red and bronze colored [[X10-D draft droid]]. The [[Trandoshan/Legends|Trandoshan]] [[Bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunter]] [[Bossk/Legends|Bossk]] used X10-D to control a variety of [[Star system/Legends|systems]] on his [[Starship/Legends|starship]], [[Hound's Tooth/Legends|''Hound's Tooth'']].

Bossk finally earned the right to own an X10-D after a successful hunt. However in order to save a few credits Bossk purchased the brainless version which proved to be a mistake. When Bossk teamed up with two other hunters, [[Chenlambec]] a Wookiee and [[Tinian I'att Azur-Jamin|Tinian I'att]] while on the hunt for the [[Millennium Falcon/Legends|''Millennium Falcon'']] the two turned on their Trandoshan comrade. With the help of a mini-droid slicer named [[Flirt]] they were able to gain control of the ship and X10-D who was wired into the ''Hound's Tooth''{{'s}} central shipboard, who was then used to lock his former master in the cargo hold. Chenlambec and Tinian I'att escaped with the ship while Flirt took the droid's body as her own.
